# 365orthodoxy

> 365orthodoxy is a modern, minimal digital Orthodox calendar (eortologio). It shows the
> Saint of the day, movable feasts, and curated spiritual quotes from Scripture, the Church
> Fathers, the Philokalia, and the Gerontikon — delivered as a lightweight widget for mobile,
> tablet, desktop, and websites. This site is the bilingual (Greek / English) landing page for
> the product, where visitors preview the widget and sign up to be notified at launch.

Status: pre-launch. A free (freemium) edition and a one-time-purchase Premium edition are
planned. The interactive widget is hosted separately and embedded on the demo section of the
homepage.

Primary language: Greek (el). Full English translation available at /en.
Canonical domain: https://365orthodoxy.com

## Pages

- [Home (Greek)](https://365orthodoxy.com/): Overview of the widget, features, sources, audience, live demo, and email signup.
- [Home (English)](https://365orthodoxy.com/en): English version of the homepage.
- [Privacy Policy (Greek)](https://365orthodoxy.com/privacy): Privacy and data handling policy.
- [Privacy Policy (English)](https://365orthodoxy.com/privacy-en): English privacy policy.

## Key features

- 365-day calendar of Saints and movable feasts.
- Daily spiritual readings from Scripture, Patristic texts, and the Gerontikon.
- Original text with Modern Greek translation toggle.
- Search by date or by Saint's name (name-day lookup).
- Random "new quote" generator, copy/share, and deeper biographies via Wikipedia.
- Responsive minimal design for desktop, Android, iOS, and embedding in websites.

## Content sources

- The Holy Bible (Old & New Testament): Psalms, Gospels, Epistles, Proverbs, Prophets.
- Patristic texts and the Philokalia.
- The Gerontikon (sayings of the Desert Fathers).
- Modern Saints (St. Paisios, St. Porphyrios).

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://365orthodoxy.com/sitemap.xml): All indexable URLs.
- Studio: Built by NOUSTELOS_STUDIO (https://noustelos.gr).
- Social: Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, and X (@365orthodoxy).
